memoryArtifacts.headline: Magnus I Von Sachsen Billung - obit
memoryArtifacts.description:
D. 23 Aug 1106
Ertheneburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany

Magnus was the duke of Saxony from 1072 to 1106. Eldest son and successor of Ordulf and Wulfhild of Norway, he was the last member of the House …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen於大約1045年出生在薩辛時，他的父親Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen26歲，母親Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway23歲。他於1070年3月2日與Sophia of Hungary在匈牙利可馬洛-斯特格姆艾斯特格姆結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1106年8月23日在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 賀爾左圖姆 勞波格史納肯貝可享年62歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛盧包格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably from a placename Sachenbach in southern Germany, the first part of which is from Old High German saher ‘reed grass’ or ‘swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Billung
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Billing, derived from Old English bil ‘sword’, or a habitational name from Great and Little Billing in Northamptonshire, meaning ‘(settlement of) the followers (Old English -ingas) of a man called Bill(a) or Bȳdel’.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, formed with a cognate of Old Saxon bīl ‘sword’.
Danish and Norwegian: from an Old Danish personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Billings
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Billing , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belling
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Belling, in Pomerania, Baden, Hesse, Thuringia, and elsewhere.

English (Devon): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Belling, Beling, of uncertain origin (perhaps from Old English Bǣdling, an original nickname from bǣdling ‘effeminate man’). Alternatively, a variant of Billing .

variants.name: Billinger
meanings: German: from the personal name   Billing   2.

en.lifeSummary: When Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen was born about 1045, in Saxony, his father, Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen, was 26 and his mother, Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway, was 23. He married Sophia of Hungary on 2 March 1070, in Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungary. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 23 August 1106, in Schnakenbek, Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, at the age of 62, and was buried in Lüneburg, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen est né environ 1045, à Sachsen, son père, Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sophia of Hungary le 2 mars 1070, à Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hongrie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 août 1106, à Schnakenbek, Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen um 1045 in Sachsen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen 26 und seine Mutter Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway 23. Er hat am 2. März 1070 in Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Ungarn Sophia of Hungary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. August 1106 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Schnakenbek, Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland und wurde in Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen è nato il circa 1045 nel Sachsen, il suo padre, Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Sophia of Hungary il 2 marzo 1070, nel Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Ungheria. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 23 agosto 1106, nel Schnakenbek, Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Germania.

Billung von Sachsenが約1045年にサチセンで生まれた時，父Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsenは26歳，母Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norwayは23歳であった。1070年3月2日にハンガリーコムaロム-エスズテルゴムエスズテルゴムでSophia of Hungaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1106年8月23日にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス ハーゾグトゥム ラウエンブルグスチナケンベクで62歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンルuネブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Schnakenbek, Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schles: 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 허초그투 로버그 슈나켄베크
ko.lifeSummary: Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen(이)가 대략 1045년 작센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1070년 3월 2일 헝가리 코a롬-스즈터고 스즈터고에서 Sophia of Hungary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1106년 8월 23일 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 허초그투 로버그 슈나켄베크에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 u니버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen nasceu aproximadamente 1045, em Sachsen, seu pai, Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sophia of Hungary em 2 de março de 1070, em Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1106, em Schnakenbek, Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.Schnakenbek, Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schles: щнеикенбек, крис хирзогтум лауенбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen родился около 1045 г. в местности сачсен, его отцу по имени Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophia of Hungary 2 марта 1070 г. в местности эсзтиргом, комaром-есзтиргом, Венгрия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 23 августа 1106 г. в местности щнеикенбек, крис хирзогтум лауенбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности лuнебург, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magnus I. Billung von Sachsen nació aproximadamente 1045, en Sachsen, su papá, Ordulf Billung Herzog von Sachsen, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Wulfhild Olavsdatter Princess of Norway, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sophia of Hungary el 2 de marzo de 1070, en Esztergom, Komárom-Esztergom, Hungría. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1106, en Schnakenbek, Kreis Herzogtum Lauenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
